metadata.description: Primary Azure region
Region for Cognitive Services — Content Safety + Text Analytics (limited regional availability)
Project name used as prefix for resource names
Common tags applied to all resources
SQL Server administrator login
SQL Server administrator password
SQL database name
App Service Plan name
Number of App Service Plan instances
Client ID of the TaskManager-Auth App Registration (manually created in Entra ID)
Entra ID tenant ID for the TaskManager-Auth App Registration
Custom domain hostname (e.g. www.myteamtasks.net). Leave empty to skip.
Blocks all traffic by default. For arena deploys the tester adds a higher-priority IP whitelist rule manually (IPv4 + IPv6 /64 prefix).
Override image for Container App Jobs on first deploy (ACR is empty). Leave blank after CI/CD has pushed images.
Comma-separated Spring Boot profiles (e.g., prod-azuresql or prod-arena-stress,DataLoader)
Per-IP req/5min on /*. 0 disables the rule (for arena stress testing).
Per-IP req/5min on /api/auth/*. 0 disables the rule (for arena stress testing).
Enable Front Door CDN caching on static asset and image routes. Disable for security testing where unprocessed origin responses must be verified.
Deploy email infrastructure (ACS + email services). Disable for arena — NoOp email beans make them unnecessary.
Value for X-Stress-Key header (WAF allow rule). Only used with stress profiles. Set via STRESS_PASSPHRASE_KEY env var.
Value for X-Stress-Nonce header (WAF allow rule). Only used with stress profiles. Set via STRESS_PASSPHRASE_NONCE env var.
App-level gate for dev-auth endpoints. When set, fake-login requires this value as X-Dev-Auth-Key header or DevGate cookie. Empty = no gate (local dev).
Email address for Azure alert notifications (budget, origin health). Leave empty to skip alert resources.
Monthly budget in the billing currency for this resource group. 0 = no budget alert deployed.
Deploy observability alerts and diagnostics (budget, origin health, WAF logs). Disable for arena.
Auto-filled start date for the monthly budget (1st of current month). Do not override.

Object ID of the deploying user (az ad signed-in-user show --query id). Grants Key Vault Secrets Officer + Storage Blob Data Contributor so the deployer can seed secrets and push default images. Leave empty to skip.
Object ID of the CI/CD service principal (GitHub Actions). Grants Storage Blob Data Contributor for frontend deployments. Leave empty to skip.

variables.stressHeaderRule: [if(variables('useStressHeaders'), createArray(createObject('name', 'AllowStressHeaders', 'priority', 2, 'ruleType', 'MatchRule', 'action', 'Allow', 'enabledState', 'Enabled', 'matchConditions', createArray(createObject('matchVariable', 'RequestHeader', 'selector', 'X-Stress-Key', 'operator', 'Equal', 'negateCondition', false(), 'matchValue', createArray(parameters('stressPassphraseKey')), 'transforms', createArray()), createObject('matchVariable', 'RequestHeader', 'selector', 'X-Stress-Nonce', 'operator', 'Equal', 'negateCondition', false(), 'matchValue', createArray(parameters('stressPassphraseNonce')), 'transforms', createArray())))), createArray())]

siteConfig.appSettings: [flatten(createArray(createArray(createObject('name', 'MANAGED_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('projectName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'KEYVAULT_URI', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('keyVaultName')), '2023-07-01').vaultUri), createObject('name', 'SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE', 'value', parameters('springProfilesActive')), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', variables('acrName')), '2023-11-01-preview').loginServer)), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_USERNAME', 'value', listCredentials(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', variables('acrName')), '2023-11-01-preview').username), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_PASSWORD', 'value', listCredentials(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', variables('acrName')), '2023-11-01-preview').passwords[0].value), createObject('name', 'APP_PUBLIC_URL', 'value', if(variables('useCustomDomain'), format('https://{0}', parameters('customDomainHost')), format('https://{0}', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/afdEndpoints', variables('frontDoorName'), format('{0}-endpoint', parameters('projectName'))), '2024-02-01').hostName))), createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_CONTAINER_STOP_TIME_LIMIT', 'value', '30'), createObject('name', 'MICROSOFT_PROVIDER_AUTHENTICATION_SECRET', 'value', format('@Microsoft.KeyVault(VaultName={0};SecretName=TASKMANAGER-AUTH-CLIENT-SECRET)', variables('keyVaultName')))), if(empty(parameters('devAuthSecret')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'DEV_AUTH_SECRET', 'value', format('@Microsoft.KeyVault(VaultName={0};SecretName=TASKMANAGER-DEV-AUTH-SECRET)', variables('keyVaultName')))))))]

parameters.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' blob: data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

associations.domains: [if(variables('useCustomDomain'), createArray(createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/afdEndpoints', variables('frontDoorName'), format('{0}-endpoint', parameters('projectName')))), createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/customDomains', variables('frontDoorName'), replace(parameters('customDomainHost'), '.', '-')))), createArray(createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/afdEndpoints', variables('frontDoorName'), format('{0}-endpoint', parameters('projectName'))))))]

properties.description: Front Door origin health dropped below 100% for 30 minutes — backend may be unreachable.
